- Accomplished

visa_types.overview:
Overview
In accordance with the rules and regulations of the Government of SriLanka, the Embassy & Consulate grants visa, on application, to those intending to visit SriLanka for tourist purposes.
The period of validity of the visa begins from the date of issue of visa. The Embassy reserves the right to refuse visa without assigning any reason. Visa fee is charged regardless of whether visa is issued or not...
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
In accordance with the rules and regulations of the Government of SriLanka, the Embassy & Consulate grants visa, on application, to those intending to visit SriLanka for tourist purposes.
The period of validity of the visa begins from the date of issue of visa. The Embassy reserves the right to refuse visa without assigning any reason. Visa fee is charged regardless of whether visa is issued or not...

## Fees and Charges

[Table:    Visit Visa]
Please Note: 
- Application fees for Attestation of Documents is payable in cash or credit/debit card. The Visa fee is the same as the fee charged at the SriLankan Embassy and Consulate for the Visa.
- Applicant shall be charged a convenience fee of SAR 25.00 per application in addition to the other fees and must be paid in cash or card (all applicable taxes included). The applicable fee in SAR is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
- Passport copy of the Applicant with minimum six months of Validity.
- Accomplished
Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5IINLxUxvVc6Xv7nCLS9gP/b3d6417d9299e8da9e15131d3c01e16d/Visa-Application-1-231126-152333.pdf)
.

## Processing Time
One Working Day (within 24Hrs) – Visa will be sent by Email to the Applicant.
